title: ASSESSMENT_APPEAL
description: Sent by Actor or Claimant to the Referee to contest a CONTRIBUTION_RESULT. Must be filed before additional_appeal_limit_datetime. When appeal_grounds.category is NEW_EVIDENCE, additional_evidence is required.

target_assessment_id.description: The ID of the CONTRIBUTION_RESULT being appealed

category.description: Category of the grounds for appeal

additional_evidence.description: Additional evidence data serving as the basis for re-examination (structure conforms to EVIDENCE_SUBMISSION)

payload.description: The evidence data body, free-form exactly as EVIDENCE_SUBMISSION.payload. The Referee independently computes the SHA-256 of this object (canonicalized per RFC 8785) and uses that computed value as the verification target against the appellant's Keeper.

sequence_number.description: (Optional) The sequence_number of the corresponding CLAIM_ANCHOR record.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this appeal was filed (ISO 8601). Included in the signed payload to establish the sender's claimed filing time.
